name: 2pc Silicone Water Bottle Ice Cube Tray with Lid Blue - Room Essentials™
description:
Whether going to the gym, traveling, or busy with other activities, keep yourself chilled with the 2-Piece Silicone Water Bottle Ice Cube Tray with Lid from Room Essentials™. This ice cube tray is designed in a rectangular shape with multiple cubes that fit inside a water bottle to help you enjoy a chilled drink on the go. It's made of silicone, comes with a lid, and has dishwasher-safe parts for easy cleanup.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
